rows.label: qev092505_MSG0001
rows.name:
Lin's design is very
exciting, is it not?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092505_MSG0002
rows.name:
Even us Ma-non would never think of this, you
know? I can't wait for those materials to get
here so so we can see it take a maiden flight...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092505_MSG0003
rows.name:
I never thought the repairs could
be done in one day, did you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092505_MSG0004
rows.name:
But working alongside Lin lit a super fire
inside me or something? It's like my my
hands started moving at hyperspeed...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092505_MSG0005
rows.name:
Isobe is making a show of staying cool, but you can
tell he's jumping up and down and shrieking on the
inside, right? What a nice guy. And a great engineer![ST:wait ]
